article_title: Burnaby Council — 7.2. Certificate of Sufficiency North Road BIA Renewal 2026-04-14 FINAL (sufficient)_.pdf

briefs.title: Council to Consider: North Road BIA Renewal Blocked by Sufficient Owner Opposition
briefs.summary: Council is set to receive a report showing that enough property owners on North Road signed against renewing the Business Improvement Area (BIA) — a special tax zone that funds local business programs — to legally block the renewal. Over 55% of affected property owners opposed it, meeting the 50% threshold required to stop the bylaw from passing.
briefs.action_required: If you own or rent on North Road, watch for updates — the BIA renewal has failed and funding stops April 1, 2026.

key_dates.label: Burnaby North Road BIA renewal funding ends — association loses grant funding
Earliest Council can re-initiate North Road BIA renewal on Council initiative
